## Describe your changes

Please include a summary of the change, the scientific motivation (if applicable), and what issue it fixes. 

## Issue ticket number and link

Fixes #

## Checklist before requesting a review
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have not committed any sensitive secrets or `.env` files
- [ ] My changes do not break the Parquet caching layer or introduce memory leaks
